title: M.Sc in Cardiovascular Technology
content: M.Sc in Cardiovascular Technology Department of Allied and Health Sciences Programme Level Post Graduate Duration 2 Years About the Programme Eligibility Fee Structure Program Structure About the Programme Eligibility Minimum 50% marks in Bachelor of Science in Cardiovascular Technology/Perfusion Technology (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer) Entrance Exam will be conducted by Galgotias University. Fee Structure Duration 2 Years Tuition Fee (per annum) 60,000 Exam Fee (per annum) 20,000 Medical Insurance (Per Annum) 650 Caution Money (One Time Payment ) 2000 Student ID Card 1000 Program Structure IMPORTANT LINKS Virtual Tour Blogs Admission Procedure Financial Aid & Loan Facilities Hostel Placements Download Brochure Admission Documents & Undertaking Apply Now Minimum 50% marks in Bachelor of Science in Cardiovascular Technology/Perfusion Technology (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer) Entrance Exam will be conducted by Galgotias University. APPLY NOW
